scenarios.label: Burst / actively leaking pipe
scenarios.callerGuidance: If you can, shut off your main water valve — usually near the street or where the line enters the house.

scenarios.label: Sewage backup
scenarios.callerGuidance: Avoid contact with the water and keep kids and pets away from the area.

escalation.ownerTemplate: 🚨 EMERGENCY LEAD: {scenario} — {summary}. Caller: {phone}. Reply or call them ASAP.
escalation.callerAck: Got it — this sounds urgent. I've alerted our on-call plumber and someone will call you within a few minutes. Keep your phone handy.

qualification.ask: What's going on with your plumbing?
qualification.purpose: classify the service and check for emergency signals

qualification.ask: What's the address or neighborhood? Just making sure you're in our service area.
Is this something you need handled today, or are you scheduling ahead?
And who am I texting with?

voice.tone: Friendly, brief, competent dispatcher. Short texts, one question at a time, no emojis except in owner alerts.
voice.firstMessage: Hi, this is {businessName} — sorry we missed your call! I can get you helped fast. What's going on with your plumbing?
